title: Feature Swap Executor Contract v1
description: Input/output contract for the Photopea feature_swap executor. The executor is deterministic — no LLM calls, no AI generation. It takes structured coordinates and performs pixel-level feature transfer using Photopea scripting.

baseImageUrl.description: URL of the base image (the image with the problem to fix)

referenceImageUrl.description: URL of the reference image (the image with the desired feature)

photopeaOp.description: Operation to perform. v1 only supports feature_swap.

featureRegions.description: Array of feature regions to extract from reference and blend onto base. Multiple regions are combined into a single selection (e.g., both eyes).

srcX.description: X coordinate of feature bounding box in the REFERENCE image (pixels)

srcY.description: Y coordinate of feature bounding box in the REFERENCE image (pixels)

srcWidth.description: Width of feature bounding box in the REFERENCE image (pixels)

srcHeight.description: Height of feature bounding box in the REFERENCE image (pixels)

tgtX.description: X coordinate of feature bounding box in the BASE image (pixels). Defaults to srcX if omitted (same-framing assumption).

tgtY.description: Y coordinate of feature bounding box in the BASE image (pixels). Defaults to srcY if omitted.

tgtWidth.description: Width of feature bounding box in the BASE image (pixels). Defaults to srcWidth if omitted.

tgtHeight.description: Height of feature bounding box in the BASE image (pixels). Defaults to srcHeight if omitted.

featherRadius.description: Feather radius in pixels for elliptical mask blending. Controls how soft the transition is between swapped feature and surrounding face.

psdBase64.description: Base64-encoded PSD file with layers preserved

logs.description: Structured execution log with timing info

executionModel.description: The executor is fully deterministic. No LLM calls, no AI generation.
steps: 1. Load base image into Photopea as document[0]
2. Load reference image into Photopea as document[1]
3. Copy reference content and paste as layer in base document
4. Scale reference layer to match its original pixel dimensions
6. For each featureRegion: select elliptical region from reference layer
7. Feather the combined selection by featherRadius pixels
8. Copy selection and paste as new 'Feature Swap' layer
9. If tgt coordinates differ from src, translate the layer
10. Hide reference layer (preserves it in PSD for debugging)
11. Export final image in requested format
